name: gobunnyy
description: GoBunnyy - Interactive web dashboard with multi-role support

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../tests/playwright && npm install
scripts.test:install: cd tests/playwright && npm install && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.deploy:worker:prod: cd backend && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:worker:dev: cd backend && npx wrangler deploy --env dev
